hero.title: Legal Advisory
hero.heading:
For Complex Deals 
 and Critical Decisions
hero.description: Kaizen Law is a corporate and transaction-focused law firm advising businesses, founders, and investors across M&A, private equity, capital markets, and general counsel mandates.

improvement.title: Built on the Principle of Continuous Improvement
paragraphs: Kaizen is not about dramatic change. It is about deliberate progress : refining structures, strengthening positions, and anticipating what lies ahead. This philosophy defines how we approach every mandate, from early-stage advisory to complex, multi-party transactions.

In mergers and acquisitions, value is rarely created by a single decisive moment. It is built through disciplined preparation, careful structuring, informed negotiation, and precise execution. Our Kaizen approach reflects this reality. We focus on incremental advantage at every stage of a transaction — identifying risk early, refining deal terms continuously, and aligning legal strategy with commercial objectives. The result is not just deal completion, but durable outcomes that withstand scrutiny and time.

aboutHero.title:
A Transaction-Focused
Law Firm Built on
Precision and Execution
aboutHero.description: Kaizen Law is a corporate and transaction advisory firm delivering big-firm quality advice through a partner-led, boutique model.

ourStory.title: Our Story
paragraphs: Founded in August 2022, Kaizen Law was established with a clear purpose — to build a focused corporate and transaction advisory firm that combines technical excellence with agility and personal accountability.

In just over two and a half years, the firm has developed a strong presence in India’s mid-market Corporate and M&A space, advising founders, promoters, investors, and multinational clients on complex domestic and cross-border matters

right.heading: The word Kaizen means continuous improvement.
right.description: In transactional practice, outcomes are shaped through disciplined preparation, thoughtful structuring, and consistent execution — not shortcuts. Our philosophy focuses on refining strategy at every stage of a mandate to achieve clarity, manage risk, and protect long-term value.

jobsData.title: UI / Graphic Designer
qualifications: 1+ year of experience partnering with stakeholders (clients, partners, users).
Strong knowledge of design systems and branding guidelines.
Proficiency in Figma, Adobe XD, and Photoshop.
Ability to translate business requirements into clean UI designs.

jobsData.title: Frontend Developer
qualifications: 2+ years of experience with React and Next.js.
Strong understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Experience with REST APIs and state management.
Familiarity with Tailwind CSS and modern UI frameworks.

jobsData.title: Digital Marketing Executive
qualifications: Experience in SEO, SEM, and social media marketing.
Knowledge of Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager.
Ability to analyze campaign performance and optimize ROI.
Strong content writing and communication skills.

jobsData.title: HR Recruiter
qualifications: Strong interviewing and candidate screening skills.
Knowledge of HR tools and ATS systems.

hero.title: Policies

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, post job listings, submit applications, or communicate with us. This includes your name, email address, phone number, company information, and any other information you choose to provide.

privateEquity.title: Private Equity & Venture Capital
privateEquity.subtitle: Advisory for Investors and Growth-Stage Companies Across the Investment Lifecycle

ourApproach.title: Our Approach
ourApproach.highlight: Our approach reflects the Kaizen philosophy — disciplined preparation, incremental refinement, and focused execution.
ourApproach.description: We prioritise early identification of deal-critical issues, clear articulation of rights and obligations, and practical support during negotiations. Senior team members remain closely involved throughout each mandate to ensure continuity and informed judgment.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kaizen Law advises private equity funds, venture capital investors, and growth-stage companies on investments, fundraises, and shareholder transactions across sectors, supporting both investors and founders across the capital lifecycle.

We work on transactions from early-stage financings to structured growth investments and exits, aligning legal strategy with commercial objectives while ensuring clarity on rights, governance, and long-term value creation.

topContent.title: Our PE & VC Practice
topContent.subtitle: We align legal strategy with commercial objectives, ensuring clarity on rights, governance, and risk. Our approach is centered on long-term value creation, helping clients make informed decisions at every stage of the transaction.

cardsData.title:
Transaction Structuring &
 Risk Allocation
cardsData.desc: Private equity and venture capital transactions demand careful structuring, commercial sensitivity, and a clear approach to risk allocation. We help design deal frameworks that protect value while remaining practical to execute.

cardsData.title:
Working Across the
 Investment Table
cardsData.desc: We work closely with investment teams, founders, boards, and management to structure transactions that balance investor protection with operational flexibility and long-term business needs.

cardsData.title:
Advising Across the Capital 
Lifecycle
cardsData.desc: We regularly advise startups and emerging companies on institutional capital raises, while also supporting investors deploying capital across diverse sectors.

investmentLifecycle.title: Advising Across the Investment Lifecycle
investmentLifecycle.description: We advise clients at each stage of the investment journey:

stackedServices.title: Early-Stage Fundraising
stackedServices.description: Supporting startups on seed, pre-Series A, and Series A rounds.

stackedServices.title: Growth-Stage & Late-Stage Investments
stackedServices.description: Advisory on complex financing rounds involving preference structures and enhanced investor rights.

stackedServices.title: Governance & Shareholder Frameworks
stackedServices.description: Structuring board rights, control mechanisms, and shareholder arrangements.

stackedServices.title: Follow-on Investments & Restructuring
stackedServices.description: Advisory on subsequent rounds, cap table reorganisation, and rights realignment.

stackedServices.title: Secondary Transactions & Exits
stackedServices.description: Supporting exits through secondary sales, strategic transactions, and sponsor-led exits.

whyClients.title: Key Areas of PE & VC Advisory
whyClients.subtitle: We deliver focused advisory to help structure investments, manage risk, and execute transactions with clarity.

cards.title: Startup & Early-Stage Fundraising
cards.desc: Advisory for founders and early-stage companies on fundraising transactions, shareholder structuring, dilution management, and governance frameworks.

cards.title: Growth-Stage & Late-Stage Investments
cards.desc: Advisory on institutional and private equity investments, including structured instruments and investor protection rights.

cards.title: Fund Structuring & Formation
cards.desc: Advisory to fund sponsors on investment vehicles and structural considerations, in coordination with tax and regulatory advisors.

cards.title: Investor-Side IP Advisory
cards.desc: Transaction-focused intellectual property advisory, including IP due diligence, ownership assessment, and IP risk allocation in investment documentation.

cards.title: Secondary Transactions & Exits
cards.desc: Advisory on secondary share sales, sponsor exits, promoter buybacks, and strategic exit transactions.

privateEquityHero.title: Representative Experience
privateEquityHero.description: We have advised investors and growth-stage companies across technology, consumer, financial services, healthcare, infrastructure, and energy sectors on investments, follow-on rounds, and exits.

privateEquity.title: Mergers-acquisition
privateEquity.subtitle: Strategic Legal Advisory for Complex and High-Value Transactions

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kaizen Law advises businesses, founders, investors, and promoters on mergers and acquisitions across the full lifecycle of a transaction. Our work spans domestic and cross-border acquisitions, listed company transactions, joint ventures, strategic investments, and shareholder exits.
We act on transactions where precision, judgment, and execution matter — supporting clients through critical decisions that shape long-term outcomes.

topContent.title: Our M&A Practice
topContent.subtitle: We bring clarity and control to complex M&A transactions, aligning legal strategy with commercial goals while ensuring efficient, well-coordinated execution at every stage.

cardsData.title:
Strategic Transaction 
Approach
cardsData.desc: Mergers and acquisitions go beyond documentation, requiring careful preparation, disciplined structuring, and proactive risk identification to preserve value.

cardsData.title:
End-to-End Execution  
Support
cardsData.desc: We support transactions through every stage, ensuring efficiency, clarity, and seamless coordination across all stakeholders.

cardsData.title:
Senior-Led 
 Collaboration
cardsData.desc: We work closely with promoters, boards, management teams, private equity sponsors, and advisors, with consistent senior involvement throughout the mandate.

investmentLifecycle.title: Advising Across the Full Deal Lifecycle
investmentLifecycle.description: Rather than viewing transactions as a linear process, we advise across the entire deal cycle  continuously refining strategy as a transaction evolves.

ourApproach.title: Our Approach
ourApproach.highlight: Our approach reflects the Kaizen philosophy deliberate, incremental improvement at every stage of a transaction.
ourApproach.description: We focus on identifying issues early, refining negotiation positions through informed judgment, and ensuring documentation accurately reflects commercial intent. Senior team members remain closely involved from start to finish, ensuring continuity, accountability, and responsiveness.

stackedServices.title: Strategic Evaluation & Structuring
stackedServices.description: Assessing objectives, transaction rationale, and readiness, while designing structures aligned with commercial, regulatory, and tax considerations.

stackedServices.title: Due Diligence & Risk Identification
stackedServices.description: Conducting legal due diligence to identify material risks and deal-critical issues at an early stage.

stackedServices.title: Negotiation & Value Protection
stackedServices.description: Supporting negotiations with a focus on risk allocation, commercial alignment, and preservation of value.

stackedServices.title: Documentation & Execution
stackedServices.description: Drafting and negotiating definitive transaction documents, and managing execution with clarity and precision.

stackedServices.title: Closing & Post-Transaction Support
stackedServices.description: Managing conditions precedent, approvals, and closing mechanics, along with post-transaction implementation, integration, and ongoing compliance.

whyClients.title: Key Areas of M&A Advisory
whyClients.subtitle: We advise on structuring and executing M&A transactions with clarity and efficiency.

cards.title: Domestic M&A
cards.desc: Advisory on acquisitions, divestitures, internal restructurings, and shareholder exits across sectors.

cards.title: Cross-Border M&A
cards.desc: Inbound and outbound transactions, including coordination with international counsel and regulatory compliance.

cards.title: Listed Company M&A
cards.desc: Advisory on acquisitions and strategic transactions involving listed entities, including securities law and disclosure considerations.

cards.title: Joint Ventures & Strategic Alliances
cards.desc: Structuring and negotiating joint ventures and long-term partnerships with a focus on governance, control, and exit mechanisms.

privateEquityHero.title: Representative Experience
privateEquityHero.description: We have advised on transactions across technology, financial services, infrastructure, energy, healthcare, and consumer sectors, including acquisitions, growth investments, strategic partnerships, and exits.

privateEquity.title: Technology Law
privateEquity.subtitle: Legal Advisory for Technology-Driven Businesses and Digital Transactions

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kaizen Law advises technology companies, founders, and investors on legal issues arising from technology-led business models and digital operations. Our technology law practice focuses on supporting innovation-driven businesses through growth, investment, and strategic transactions.

We work with clients across the technology ecosystem — including SaaS platforms, digital marketplaces, consumer internet companies, and enterprise technology businesses — providing legal advisory that aligns with commercial objectives and evolving regulatory frameworks.

topContent.title: Our Technology Law Practice
topContent.subtitle: We provide clear, business-aligned legal guidance to help technology companies grow while managing regulatory and commercial complexity.

cardsData.title:
Navigating Complex 
Regulatory Landscapes
cardsData.desc: We advise technology businesses operating in evolving legal environments shaped by intellectual property, data usage, platform regulations, and complex commercial arrangements.

cardsData.title:
Support at Key 
Growth Stages
cardsData.desc: We assist clients through critical inflection points — including fundraising, scaling, strategic partnerships, and exits — ensuring legal frameworks enable, not hinder, growth.

cardsData.title:
Business-Aligned Legal 
Guidance
cardsData.desc: Working closely with product, commercial, and investment teams, we translate complex legal issues into clear, practical advice aligned with business objectives.

digitalTransformation.title: Technology in Transactions
digitalTransformation.subtitle: Technology considerations are often central to valuation and risk assessment in modern transactions. Our team regularly advises on technology-related issues arising in:
cardsData: Venture capital and growth-stage investments
Private equity transactions involving technology assets
Mergers and acquisitions of digital businesses
Strategic partnerships and joint ventures

ourApproach.title: Our Approach
ourApproach.highlight: Our approach to technology law is commercially grounded and transaction-aware. We focus on understanding how technology supports the business model and tailoring legal advice accordingly.
ourApproach.description: We prioritise clarity, responsiveness, and practicality — enabling founders, management teams, and investors to make informed decisions without unnecessary complexity.   Senior team members remain closely involved throughout each mandate, ensuring consistency and strategic oversight.

privateEquity.title: General Counsel Services
privateEquity.subtitle: Ongoing Legal Advisory for Founders, Promoters, and Management Teams

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kaizen Law provides General Counsel services offering consistent, senior-level legal advisory without a full in-house team. Our practice support founders and management with ongoing, commercially focused guidance across corporate, commercial, regulatory, and transaction matters.
We act as an extension of the client’s leadership team, providing practical legal guidance aligned with business priorities.

topContent.title: Our General Counsel Practice
topContent.subtitle: We act as an extended legal partner, providing integrated, day-to-day guidance that supports decision-making, manages risk, and evolves with your business as it grows.

cardsData.title:
Managing Interconnected 
Legal Complexity
cardsData.desc: As businesses scale, we address legal issues across contracts, governance, regulatory obligations, investor expectations, and risk management in an integrated manner.

cardsData.title:
Ongoing Advisory & Strategic
 Support
cardsData.desc: We work closely with leadership teams to provide day-to-day legal guidance, proactive risk identification, and support on key business decisions.

cardsData.title:
Tailored, Stage-Aligned
 Approach
cardsData.desc: Our advisory is customised to each client’s stage, sector, and operating environment, ensuring relevant and practical legal support.

accordionData.title: About
accordionData.content:
Harsh is a highly experienced and recommended transactional lawyer with over 18 years of experience in advising on Indian laws. He specializes in mergers & acquisitions of listed and unlisted companies, private equity, and venture capital transactions. He has worked on complex, high-end transactions involving domestic and cross-border investments and acquisitions for leading Indian corporates, MNCs, and Indian start-ups and unicorns across diverse industry sectors such as manufacturing, healthcare, pharmaceuticals, e-commerce & logistics, I.T. & services, and new-age/sunrise sectors.

In addition to transactional work, Harsh advises companies on commercial and contractual matters and acts as an external advisor to the board of directors of leading Indian companies. He has previously worked as a partner at Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas and Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas and in the London office of Herbert Smith Freehills LLP, an international law firm, on international corporate law transactions.

Harsh has been recognized for his legal expertise and leadership in the legal profession by Indian and international publications.

accordionData.title: Areas of Specialisation
accordionData.content:
Mergers & Acquisitions,
Private Equity,
Venture Capital,
Corporate Restructuring,
Commercial Contracts.

accordionData.content:
Bar Council of India,
International Bar Association,
Indian National Bar Association.

accordionData.title: Education
accordionData.content:
LLB – Delhi University,
LLM – University of London.

startupHero.title: Startups & Emerging Companies
startupHero.description: Legal Advisory for Businesses Building, Scaling, and Preparing for Exit

ourStory.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kaizen Law advises startups and emerging companies at critical stages of their growth — from incorporation and early operations to institutional fundraising, strategic transactions, and exits.

We work closely with founders and management teams navigating fast-evolving business models, capital requirements, and regulatory considerations. Our advice is grounded in an understanding of how startups operate in practice, balancing speed, flexibility, and long-term value creation.

overview.title: Our Work with Startups
overview.description: We support startups with clear, practical legal guidance, helping founders navigate early complexity, manage risk, and build strong foundations for scalable growth.

advisorySections.title: Managing Early Complexity
advisorySections.desc: Startups face a distinct set of legal and commercial challenges — building products, raising capital, hiring talent, entering partnerships, and responding to regulatory scrutiny, often simultaneously.

advisorySections.title: Enabling Scalable Growth
advisorySections.desc: Our role is to provide clarity and structure without slowing momentum. We support startups as trusted legal advisors, helping them anticipate issues early and make informed decisions as they scale.

advisorySections.title: Founder-Focused Expertise
advisorySections.desc: We regularly advise founder-led businesses across technology, consumer, fintech, education, and digital services sectors.

whyClients.title: Key Areas of Advisory for Startups
whyClients.subtitle: We support startups with end-to-end legal advisory, helping them build strong foundations, raise capital, manage risk, and scale with confidence.

cards.title: Incorporation & Early-Stage Structuring
cards.desc: Advisory on company formation, founder shareholding structures, and post-incorporation compliance, ensuring a strong foundation for future growth and investment.

cards.title: Fundraising & Investment Transactions
cards.desc: Advisory on seed, Series A, and growth-stage fundraising, including negotiation of investment and shareholder documentation, governance rights, and dilution management.

cards.title: General Advisory & Ongoing Support
cards.desc: Ongoing legal advisory across contracts, employment matters, regulatory considerations, and operational issues as businesses scale.

cards.title: Technology, Data & Business Model Advisory
cards.desc: Advisory on technology-driven business models, data usage, platform structures, and compliance considerations relevant to digital and technology-led startups.

cards.title: Strategic Transactions & Exits
cards.desc: Support on founder exits, secondary transactions, strategic sales, and acquisitions as startups mature and explore liquidity events.

pevcPractice.title: How We Work with Founders
pevcPractice.subtitle: We understand that founders often engage with legal advisors for the first time while building their businesses. Our approach focuses on:
cardsData: Clear, practical advice that supports decision-making
Early identification of risks that may affect valuation or control
Structuring arrangements that scale with the business
Partner-level involvement throughout critical phases

startupHero.description: Legal Advisory for Regulated Businesses, Platforms, and Financial Institutions

ourStory.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kaizen Law advises financial services institutions and fintech businesses on transactions, regulatory considerations, and strategic advisory matters across the financial ecosystem.

Our work spans traditional financial institutions, NBFCs, lending platforms, payments businesses, wealth and asset management companies, and technology-enabled financial services providers. We support clients operating in highly regulated environments where legal structuring, regulatory positioning, and execution discipline are critical.

ourStory.title: Overview

We work with developers, promoters, investors, and strategic partners involved in energy transition, infrastructure development, and asset ownership. Our advisory focuses on structuring transactions, managing regulatory considerations, and supporting execution in capital-intensive and highly regulated environments.

We work with founders, management teams, and investors building and scaling digital enterprises where technology, data, and regulation intersect. Our advisory focuses on enabling growth while managing legal and regulatory risk in fast-evolving digital markets.

ourStory.title: Overview

We work with founders, promoters, strategic buyers, and financial investors operating in brand-driven and consumer-focused sectors, where scale, speed, and execution discipline are critical.   Our advisory supports businesses navigating growth, consolidation, and exit opportunities in dynamic and competitive consumer markets.
